title: abies fraseri var. hudsonia
intro: Abies fraseri var. hudsonia, also known as Fraser fir, is a variant of the Fraser fir tree native to the highlands of western North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and reduce pain. The health benefits of Abies fraseri var. hudsonia include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and act as a natural antiseptic to prevent infections. Herbal preparations of Abies fraseri var. hudsonia include essential oils, infusions, and tinctures that can be used topically or taken internally, depending on the desired health benefits.
